## 🏛️ DSOM Contribution Checklist

> **"One Mind, Many Hands."** - Ensure your contribution aligns with the Sovereign Laws.

### 🛡️ Governance
- [ ] I have read `docs/AI-MASTER-PROTOCOL.md`.
- [ ] My code follows the **Zero-Global Pattern** (No global variables).
- [ ] I have run `./tools/audit-pre-flight.sh` (or `.ps1`) locally.

### 🧠 Cognitive Alignment
- [ ] **Context:** I have updated `.agents/brain/task.md` (if applicable).
- [ ] **Record:** I have explained my "Why" in a `walkthrough.md` entry (or will do so).
- [ ] **Atomic:** This PR addresses a single, focused sub-task.

### 🛠️ Functionality
- [ ] My changes are **Sovereign Portable** (Linux/Windows agnostic where possible).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation in `tools-and-automation/` (if changing scripts).
